title: CADAVERPILLED_HERO.OF.THE.VILLAGE.LAVA
description: CADAVERPILLED_HERO.OF.THE.VILLAGE.LAVA adds Lava Buckets to the list of avaliable Toolsmith Villager gifts when affected with Hero of the Village after defeating a Raid.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KdgqLr2KvJY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds Lava Buckets to the list of avaliable Toolsmith Villager gifts when affected with Hero of the Village after defeating a Raid. Toolsmiths gift Lava buckets at a 5% Chance. This Data Pack is meant for challenge runs such as Structureless Superflat, Hardcore Skyblock or One Grass Block so that stone and nether access are obtainable.
